jobs.task: Pull weekly metrics for Chris. Run GA4 traffic + signups, MailerLite new subscribers + automation stats, GSC keyword movements, Meta ads spend. Format as a clean Slack summary. Compare to previous week. Send to Chris on Slack.
jobs.name: Cron: 0 7 * * 1

jobs.task: First of the month: Pull full monthly growth report. MRR from Stripe (if available), GA traffic by channel, trial signups, conversion rates, MailerLite automation performance, SEO rankings, ad performance. Compare month-over-month. Update STRATEGY doc with learnings. Send summary to Chris on Slack.
jobs.name: Cron: 0 7 1 * *

jobs.task: Check if Google Ads API Basic Access has been approved. Run: node /data/.openclaw/workspace/skills/google-ads/scripts/ads_query.js "SELECT customer.descriptive_name FROM customer LIMIT 1" — if it works, notify Chris that Google Ads is live. If still rejected, set another reminder for 3 days later.
jobs.name: Cron: 0 10 12 3 *

jobs.task: Friday SEO check: Pull GSC data for the week. Compare top keyword positions to previous week. Flag any significant ranking changes (up or down 5+ positions). Check if our target pages (client-onboarding-checklist, digital-marketing-reporting, free-ai-tools) moved. Save findings to memory/seo-weekly/.
jobs.name: Cron: 0 12 * * 5
